summary: Ukrainian forces used FPV drones to kill a Russian soldier who attempted to flee after pretending to surrender, and also struck two Russian soldiers on motorcycles during an assault on Ukrainian positions. In the Kostiantynivka direction, Ukrainian soldiers of the 36th Marine Brigade survived a Russian FPV drone attack, with video showing a drone detector being used to identify the threat. Russian forces conducted airstrikes on air defense systems in Krasnopolye and used LMUR-armed UAVs to strike targets in Pavlovka, Sumy region.
